'''竏單-dh-f-w''' ('''kadadhfewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yellow|yellow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-dh-f-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yellow|yellow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏單-dh-f-w
|-
! Lemma
| kadadhfewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidadhfewoko|thidadhfewoko]] || [[word:jidadhfewoko|jidadhfewoko]] || [[word:shidadhfewoko|shidadhfewoko]] || [[word:kidadhfewoko|kidadhfewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudadhfewoko|thuthudadhfewoko]] || [[word:jujudadhfewoko|jujudadhfewoko]] || [[word:shushudadhfewoko|shushudadhfewoko]] || [[word:kukudadhfewoko|kukudadhfewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodadhfewoko|thodadhfewoko]] || [[word:jodadhfewoko|jodadhfewoko]] || [[word:shodadhfewoko|shodadhfewoko]] || [[word:kodadhfewoko|kodadhfewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦdadhfewoko|thﾃｦdadhfewoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦdadhfewoko|jﾃｦdadhfewoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦdadhfewoko|shﾃｦdadhfewoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦdadhfewoko|kﾃｦdadhfewoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadadhfewoko|thadadhfewoko]] || [[word:jadadhfewoko|jadadhfewoko]] || [[word:shadadhfewoko|shadadhfewoko]] || [[word:kadadhfewoko|kadadhfewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadadhfewoko|thadadhfewoko]] || [[word:jadadhfewoko|jadadhfewoko]] || [[word:shadadhfewoko|shadadhfewoko]] || [[word:kadadhfewoko|kadadhfewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
